mechanics.excerpt: FORGERY character with Forgery Skill can produce and detect forg; eries Forgery deals primarily with the techniques for producing forged ignatures and documents, though it also gives the char- acter familiarity with equipment that can detect an art forgery by analyzing the chemical composition of paints and paper; The gamemaster should make the Forgery Action Check for character creating forgery; so that the character will be unaware of the forgery's effectiveness.
